product_brief: A collection of open source projects building high-assurance software implementations of standards-track post-quantum cryptography algorithms.
pqc_capability_description: The project builds high-assurance implementations of standards-track PQC algorithms, specifically ML-KEM (FIPS 203) and ML-DSA (FIPS 204). It includes C90, Assembly, and Rust implementations optimized for various environments including embedded microcontrollers. Some code is formally verified for panic freedom and correctness.
crypto_primitives: ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA (inferred from repository name slhdsa-c)
release_date: 2026-03-30 (based on latest repository update date mentioned)
fips_validated: No mention of validation status; implementations target FIPS 203 and FIPS 204 standards.
primary_platforms: C90, Assembly, Rust, Embedded microcontrollers, AVX2 optimized environments
pqc_roadmap_details: Full AVX2 support for rust-libcrux will be added over the coming months.
